 What threw Chandrababu Naidu out? –
Friday, 14 May , 2004, 16:54
The defeat of TDP at the hands of Congress was the most unlikely episode that could
unbolt in the history of Andhra Pradesh election…at least at this juncture when everything
seemed to move smoothly for Chandrababu Naidu. The CM was known better as the AP
CEO for the IT revolution that happened during his 10-year tenure. So what went wrong for
